title: What Operators Say
subtitle: We only publish verified outcomes. Public case studies and customer proof are being prepared.
comingSoonMessage: Customer proof coming soon — currently onboarding early implementation partners.

founderNote.heading: Founder note
founderNote.body: CogniFox is intentionally practical: fewer moving parts, clearer workflows, and weekly execution you can trust. As customer stories are approved, they will be added here with measurable before/after outcomes.
